title: Two-Phase Locking Protocol Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequence of phases and rules a transaction must follow to acquire and release locks under the Two-Phase Locking (2PL) protocol.
relationships: A transaction begins, then enters the Growing Phase where it can only acquire new locks. After reaching its Lock Point, it enters the Shrinking Phase where it can only release locks. It ends once all locks are released and the transaction is committed or aborted.
